body_txt: Sometimes, when somebody goes through a severe, emotionally traumatic experience or suffers a physical head injury, their brain removes the memory of that event; this causes Trauma-Induced Amnesia. These memories can be often recovered over time through therapy, magic, or whatever is appropriate in the setting; but sometimes, another traumatic experience will bring them to the surface in Flash Back form. Sometimes depicted as appearing only in Past Experience Nightmares , which often results in Dreaming the Truth . Sometimes, the memories simply come back on their own. Or with The Power of Love . Related to Heroic BSoD . Subtrope of Laser-Guided Amnesia . Frequently occurs as a result of a Heroic Sacrifice . Can be ended with an Injury Bookend . Also see Repressed Memories .
